findings.summary: The proposed omp-rpc-spawner test plan omits the automatic get_state handshake required on ready.
findings.evidence: Unit 2 requires the spawner to send { "type": "get_state" } after ready so Maestro can obtain session ID and context window (plan.md:72-77, 775-778, 794). Unit 5-B's proposed cases cover ready, generic command writes, queued-command flush, extension_ui_request auto-response, and kill-on-close, but not get_state (plan.md:1059-1064). OMP defines get_state as a dedicated RPC command and response (oh-my-pi/packages/coding-agent/src/modes/rpc/rpc-types.ts:27, 102; rpc-mode.ts:483-499).
findings.impact: A regression in the ready-handshake stdin path can break session/context initialization while every planned spawner test still passes.
findings.recommended_fix: Add explicit get_state coverage to the new spawner test, ideally asserting the automatic stdin write after ready and a matching mock response path.

findings.summary: The useInlineWizard test row names a wizard tile assertion, but the current file actually hard-codes the wizard-capable agent list.
findings.evidence: Codebase Context describes src/__tests__/renderer/hooks/useInlineWizard.test.ts as a file that references the agent list (plan.md:44). Unit 5-B later calls it an 'OMP wizard tile' update (plan.md:1055). The test itself gates wizard support with ['claude-code', 'codex', 'opencode'].includes(agentId) (src/__tests__/renderer/hooks/useInlineWizard.test.ts:17-18).
findings.impact: The wording can send an implementer to the wrong assertion surface and make the file update less direct than it should be.
findings.recommended_fix: Rewrite the Unit 5-B row to describe adding OMP to the mocked supportsWizard / wizard-capable agent list.
